infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeFall AI needs constant Bluetooth access to monitor fall data and sensor telemetry from your smartwatch device.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: SafeFall AI connects to your smartwatch using Bluetooth to detect falls in real-time.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeFall AI uses location services to find your address during fall alerts and share emergency location with contacts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeFall AI monitors location continuously in the background to ensure that if a fall occurs, the exact coordinates can be sent immediately to caregivers.

plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow SafeFall AI to access location services in the background to send help when a fall is detected.
